textByHash.05fbdfc78c742c4850a17bc752dae78ef0118809: Good day, how may I help you?
textByHash.0c6dd75ec85decd72d479b0639813505425c7377: We're the only bank on these two islands, so business is pretty good.
textByHash.103d34d304c169e4cfc2a45c41428aea285b4361: Business has always gone well here, but now more than ever. We are getting a constant supply of gold from the new gold mine south of the city.
textByHash.1387b27e9cd038aadef5a04bbf461efac6084e98: Newcomers aren't allowed to use the bank. Come back once you've earned our trust.
textByHash.13ff9041bfe4b7ce4b399eefd92ec292821cb1b7: Stop messing about and go away!
textByHash.2265a4b720c47d4bcafdc05afe527c465c609406: Now I'm stuck here, ferrying items back and forth to the bank's safe in Varrock for people like you.
textByHash.2938a289749a370bc8f9d7028df9eb9559f4a2b1: No problem. However, we first need to tax you for your bank usage.
textByHash.29bfcc417ddb2115f303bed1622e8cf9674a42e6: You blind meat bag? It's a bank. You can store your valuables here... not that I expect you to have any.
textByHash.2a4ad04a3cd1df8edbce448c564e080e67b0df6a: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We have branches in many towns.
textByHash.2e7173dfa3478bb7621b69a28398070c7f62d9e9: Aye? Ye got some stuff te stash?
textByHash.32e0af8e74f7c10cebe70f60c89fee876c3e96c3: Welcome to the Sophanem Bank! Anything I can help you with?
textByHash.367ae47bb929f0e4951f4a5bafe52edf861bb8b6: Was there anything else with which I can help you?
textByHash.38e41aba6ddb89af09b54565471dd15c0c95680f: Why? You don't use the bank.
textByHash.3d611bb1e7249a4de992f7c9c04c94915d64d757: What do you want meat bag?
textByHash.3ecc01ce3536b829dbc3d3a64e1ae83833d02bf8: This be a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. Ye may have heard of us.
textByHash.3ef8cca344b5c4b976c4ff9d7fc6793dc564c590: Mourners don't deal with taxes. Nice try.
textByHash.419905d0b461b3bffaedfe7780df925f86a9cf89: This is the Bank of Dorgesh-Kaan! Since surface dwellers began coming into the city, we've made an arrangement with the Bank of Gielinor on the surface, so we can act as one of their branches.
textByHash.435f720e7200b358882db130256e630747329c74: Quick! Get to the party room!
textByHash.441128b5d2fedf8d4d18cdb31d7371d46fd89ff0: This is a branch of the Bank of Glielinor. We have branches in many towns.
textByHash.48957801cd83c8db118a250438a824dd690aae97: Was there anything else I can help you with?
textByHash.4bd0f258c10a2a176fdaaa70128f13cb99cda2c3: We keep an eye on yer loot for ye. Leave yer valuables with us if ye want to keep 'em nice and safe.
textByHash.5267bfd03f1f4f25a0d866dda19c9a816b05ae62: I can sell you up to additional bank slots in sets of 40. How many are you interested in buying?
textByHash.534bf57ffddc57fc400c7f49425fe6d2e6ba097f: I'm afraid not! You've already got as much bank space as you can obtain without purchase.
textByHash.53b9ae3b510eecb58369d8e9d0e170ff06e57a5d: Welcome to the Keldagrim bank! Anything I can help you with?
textByHash.554c0b3373f8a950084c152f7a74034decb1054b: What's happening in the party room?
textByHash.5bfb8de6088ad82e6e4d5e516d8bc0801f682dde: Doctor wh.. hang on, I'm not falling for that one again! Go away.
textByHash.60405f7a418734324d771b2bd43336389bdd21f0: We have liaised with the Bank of Gielinor. It's healthy to keep a bit of trade going with the human population, you know.
textByHash.68ea51670c6770a1361976f1eb9501a91e3072f9: This is a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. We don't really have too much need of it ourselves, but it's quite useful for tourists and such.
textByHash.7063e9aab6ee66bf02d3b5cc19ad0186aca1fe7c: Get to the party room NOW!
textByHash.781a0067d1995aab06ce84a10c586ea4e76e06d0: We will look after your items and money for you. Leave your valuables with us if you want to keep them safe.
textByHash.78e04f871a8719f3a3392362653d89141ada4352: Hand me a banknote, and I'll try to convert it to an item.
textByHash.7a1b8c16a5fc3716535761728ed62657919c4536: As you may have noticed, the desert adds complications to all matters of trade and finance.
textByHash.7fa8ced345fd888ea1e0dfc6600a0618683f518d: Big value items in the party room now!
textByHash.82b6c1de93b3cc2c9c5900f73dac304d73c6580e: Get to the party room quick!
textByHash.844bda298738d32eea5e6cb61944c0e2bb75278b: What? I'm not... oh, just go away!
textByHash.8711590acfec471a9f59192dadfd8029dfad5df7: Buying additional bank slots will cost coins. Be warned, this purchase is not reversible. Are you happy to proceed?
textByHash.8e8d9df197df6af6e37c38ca3533797af2b8f287: Hi there, can I help you with anything?
textByHash.8fc7e5685ea9039eadef78c6f6a8075ddc053880: The other clerks and myself pulled straws and I was unlucky enough to be sent to this stinking death trap.
textByHash.9232dd373c543e398f7ac54e4c0a1b340538be1f: Why yes, what else would it be?
textByHash.937fb2e088f65333624ec9c9da37850ccffd12df: Real secure. Before we got here, people were just dumpin' stuff into a bucket guarded by a man with an iron bar.
textByHash.9b0f548fe7bc64a338365303f55ad2b83e06ef80: I can sell you up to additional bank slots in sets of 50. How many are you interested in buying?
textByHash.9b8fe103327a53b9767124903e038fae97828ecf: Well it's only fair right? You tax us so we tax you.
textByHash.9ff26060f8f0976194f1bb64b25a83e836928b70: I used to work in the East Varrock branch. Then a request came in to set up a bank in this new town.
textByHash.a040955ef191863a69f3cd379011ad02c7b2e251: We have an agreement with them, yes. It took some time to work out.
textByHash.a16247315f0d4d5e45259309e0e24e20c95d2723: Tell that to my back and legs, I'm exhausted from carrying all this junk back and forth.
textByHash.a57d5a9e6d1cd2071b1e960163b5c8247df4603f: It's not about the size, it's how you use it. I've got all I'll ever need within an arms reach.
textByHash.ab086e81d601b6f96ff69a42500ee7a09187651b: Only guild members can use the bank. Sorry.
textByHash.b2f21aceca807fbb86c352181dd45b2e9eb0e5cb: You blind? It's a bank. You can store your valuables here... if you have any.
textByHash.b84459798a7a6e1fb3d95fb1ac7416d97f9164bf: Oh yes, we are a branch, but an independent branch.
textByHash.be9f68908f9186c225496ae75341ef81ccb37ede: I'm not supposed to tell you this, but you can obtain more bank space by , .
textByHash.c0decd12cf46d011fea6b78f12350c6040a04d59: Since we arrived, we can get all the stuff organised nice and civil like, and with only half as many kneecappins.
textByHash.c5d051a6b324ba498404e1f761fe7e8b4d142953: Well, we at the Bank of Gielinor are keen to make sure that our services are always easily accessible. That includes making ourselves available in the more remote parts of the sea.
textByHash.c867ee502d4ae2015c97f79712b32d16ae31dd23: Everyone get to the party room!
textByHash.ca833986c4a97ebf9ed3ab2d06692ce3003549a8: Was there something else you wanted?
textByHash.d315478274b173d13cadb74f820bc21cfc11dee9: Your additional bank slots have been added.
textByHash.d876fa8985c97a305cc1c1dd31d09bd5a12d49ff: And what can the Sophanem Bank do for you today?
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
textByHash.e0fdc9795329c2bf10aeb31a6f3ac7f064f02d66: Hello, surface dweller! How can I help you?
textByHash.e5f004b6acac356894058de5c8c45deb1a488eb3: Citizens don't deal with taxes. Nice try.
textByHash.ee7acbed8fd7ff2ade84deea3ba3fa89fc13d62c: Ah, yes. I don't really have a good answer to that to be honest, but he is very helpful.
textByHash.f0de911993ec5c9b13ea04b09128b9d285b252ef: No. Staff only beyond this point. You can't come in here.
textByHash.fad6aa2a525f2076bb2f226e83381389efcf1f14: Something's happening in the party room!
textByHash.fc75d00d8697ed25a9023a7b40ab0b41b23d1b4a: It could be better. The businesses here are still recovering from recent events. Personal banking like yours makes up the majority of our trade.
textByHash.fcf852df3ff145d330a1b988e8b07fc89e907c77: Oh great, another customer. What do you want?
